commit.message:
Add personal best tracking with confetti animation

Backend:
- /api/submit now returns is_new_pb (bool) and prev_best, computed by
  combining COUNT+MAX into a single pre-insert query (no schema change)

Frontend:
- PB badge on each unlocked scene card (⭐ PB: 87%) using best_scores
  from userProgress, updates on every renderCards() call
- #pbBanner inside score panel — shows "⭐ New Personal Best!" when
  is_new_pb is true, gold animated pill with scale-in keyframe
- showPBBlast() — 70-piece CSS confetti burst + large gold text overlay,
  auto-removes after 3.2s; fires alongside the score panel banner
- Personal Bests section in My Progress modal: scenes sorted by best
  score descending, shows ↑ arrow when latest attempt beats previous one

commit.message:
Add friend challenge system

Backend:
- challenges table (challenge_id, challenger_username, scene_id, score_to_beat)
- POST /api/challenge — creates a challenge link, returns short hex ID + URL
- GET /api/challenge/{id} — returns challenge details (public, no auth)
- GET /challenge/{id} — SPA route: serves index.html so JS handles routing

Frontend:
- URL routing in boot: detects /challenge/[id] path, loads challenge screen
- #challengeScreen — full-page challenge card showing challenger, score, movie
- "Accept Challenge" button opens scene modal with challengeCtx set
- After scoring: showChallengeResult() shows YOU WON / So close overlay
- "⚔ Challenge a Friend" button in score panel → POST to create challenge
- Share panel: copy link + WhatsApp share button
- Login/register from challenge page flows back into challenge after auth

commit.message:
Add SAP-specific headers (Prefer, B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch) and improve field-mapping debug endpoint

- Add 'Prefer: odata.maxpagesize=0' header (standard SAP SL header)
- Add 'B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch: true' header (critical for PATCH staged updates)
- Update field-mapping endpoint to show all 3 stage payloads for debugging
- Show exact headers being sent in field-mapping response

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add cross-card drag-and-drop: move items between any visible cards

Lift DndContext from ChecklistCard to CascadingCards so all items across
all visible cards share one drag context. Items can now be dragged between
parent and child cards, dropped into nest zones of items in different cards,
and placed at the end of any card via a droppable end-zone. Circular drops
(into own descendants) are blocked. Adds DragOverlay for cross-card visual
feedback and crossCardCollision detection that picks the topmost card when
cards overlap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add database indexes for query performance

Messages table was missing indexes on contact_id, created_at,
is_read, direction, campaign_id, and telnyx_message_id. The contacts
list query runs 6 correlated subqueries per contact — without indexes,
each one does a full table scan. With 200k+ contacts this makes the
app unusably slow.

commit.message:
fix: harden template routing and add GP sidebar disable

Root cause of regression: checklist and homepage template routing
relied solely on WP Admin page-template assignment (get_page_template_slug),
which is cleared on clean reinstall.

Changes:
- Extracted lnb_get_template() helper (child-theme override support)
- Rewrote lnb_template_include() with explicit is_* check per page type:
  1. is_singular('lnb_name') → single-name.php
  2. is_tax('name_letter')   → archive-letter.php
  3. is_tax('name_collection') → archive-collection.php
  4. is_page('names')        → archive-names.php
  5. is_page('collections')  → archive-collections.php
  6. is_page('checklist') || is_page_template(...) → page-checklist.php
  7. is_front_page()+is_page() || is_page_template(...) → page-home.php
- Added lnb_is_lnb_page() central helper used by sidebar/body_class/enqueue
- Added generate_sidebar_layout filter returning 'no-sidebar' on all LNB
  pages — belt-and-suspenders so GP never injects sidebar even if template
  routing degrades
- lnb_body_classes() and lnb_enqueue_frontend_assets() now use lnb_is_lnb_page()

feat: add Google Chat integration for scheduled deliveries (backend) (#20881)

* feat: add Google Chat integration for scheduled deliveries (backend)

Add webhook-based Google Chat support for scheduled deliveries and alerts,
following the same pattern as MS Teams. Includes:

- Common types: SchedulerGoogleChatTarget, type guards, error class, task payloads
- Database: migration for scheduler_google_chat_target table
- GoogleChatClient: sends messages using cardsV2 format with image/CSV support
- SchedulerModel: CRUD for Google Chat targets
- SchedulerClient/Task/Worker: batch notification job processing
- Config: GOOGLE_CHAT_ENABLED env var feature flag (default: false)
- Analytics: googlechat tracking events

Closes #18267
Ref: PROD-947

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use wallet provider for RPC — requests from user's IP, not Vercel/AWS

The OP_NET regtest node blocks cloud IPs (502 from Vercel). Using the
wallet's provider routes RPC through the user's browser (their IP),
which the node allows. Still patch _send for native fetch() and
pre-populate _rlAddress to skip btc_publicKeyInfo.

commit.message:
Add Streamable HTTP MCP transport and fly.io deployment config

Server now supports both transports:
- stdio: for local MCP clients (node server/index.js --transport stdio)
- Streamable HTTP: for remote clients like Claude Desktop
  (node server/index.js --transport http)

Streamable HTTP endpoint at /mcp handles POST (messages),
GET (SSE stream), DELETE (close session). Stateful sessions with
UUID session IDs. Each MCP client gets its own Server instance
but all share the same WebSocket relay to the browser editor.

Includes Dockerfile, .dockerignore, and fly.toml for fly.io deploy.
Default start script changed to HTTP transport for deployment.

commit.message:
Fix worktree creation from folder context menu

Two issues:
1. sanitizeBranchName was re-exported but not imported locally in
   worktree-service.ts, causing ReferenceError at runtime
2. Session creation with folderId + featureDescription hit the wrong
   code path (explicit projectPath path) instead of the folder-based
   repo resolution path. Consolidated so folderId always uses folder
   preferences to resolve the repository.

commit.message:
Open latest non-backup session when using Open in DAW (⌥↩)

recently modified session in the project group. Falls back to the
matched session if all sessions are backups.

Bump to v0.3.13: refactor pass — dedup, simplify, update docs

- Add send_void helper eliminating 26 void-return boilerplate sites
- Add sleep_ms helper replacing 14 verbose tokio::time::sleep calls
- Add eval_str/eval_bool helpers on Element reducing 7 methods to one-liners
- Merge navigate/navigate_with_referrer, go_back/go_forward, FetchEnable variants
- Replace 9 identical empty CDP structs with type aliases to shared Empty
- Single-pass escape_js_string replacing 10 chained .replace() calls
- Fix duplicate "Win64; x64" in Windows user agent generation
- Update README and CLAUDE.md with complete API documentation

Net: -100 lines of code, zero behavior change, all tests green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix request type enrichment: use per-ticket JSM API with expand=requestType

The bulk JSM request endpoint returns empty values. Switch to per-ticket
GET /rest/servicedeskapi/request/{key}?expand=requestType which correctly
returns the request type data. Move enrichment from JiraClient.search_all()
to the cache layer so existing cached data can be carried forward, avoiding
18k API calls on every full refresh.

- Copy buttons on all code blocks

- Expanding tables (long tables collapse, click to reveal all rows)
- Progress rings on Status page (5 animated SVG gauges)
- Reading time estimates on all interior pages
- Typewriter effect on page titles
- Smooth page transitions (fade between pages)

- Full prefers-reduced-motion and mobile responsive support
